name: Deploy Signal-Weave MCP service
desc: Build and deploy assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/mcp-services/signal-weave/server.js as a live MCP service for cross-service event signaling

name: Deploy Discord Resonance MCP service
desc: Implement assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/mcp-services/discord-resonance — MCP tools for Discord community ops integrated with HeadyBuddy

name: Build Skill Graph MCP service from schema
desc: Implement skill-graph MCP service using assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/mcp-services/skill-graph/schema.json — skill dependency graph for bee routing

name: Deploy HuggingFace Space with Docker config
desc: Use assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/huggingface-space/docker/Dockerfile to deploy Heady HuggingFace Space for public demos and model hosting

name: Wire Discord status wall to auto-success engine
desc: Use assets/beneficial-bundle/assets/effects/discord-status-wall.html as template — wire to auto-success engine status for real-time Discord display

name: Wire swarm-orbit visualization to HeadyConductor
desc: Use assets/beneficial-bundle/assets/effects/swarm-orbit.html as base for Swarm Dashboard — wire orbit nodes to real bee status from conductor

name: Wire color-shift telemetry to system health
desc: Use assets/beneficial-bundle/assets/effects/color-shift-telemetry.html — shift UI accent colors based on real system health scores

name: Apply Heady UI tokens to all frontends
desc: Distribute assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/ui-tokens/heady-ui-tokens.json to all frontend apps — standardize sacred geometry colors and spacing

name: Create GitHub issues from beneficial-bundle seeds
desc: Use assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/github/issue-seeds.md to create GitHub issues in HeadyAI/Heady for the key beneficial bundle tasks

name: Build signal-weave connector for inter-service events
desc: Deploy signal-weave/server.js as a side-car MCP server that bridges Heady events to external webhooks and Discord notifications

name: Create Discord server with role-builder assets
desc: Use assets/beneficial-bundle/assets/discord/ SVG assets to configure HeadyConnection Discord server with proper roles and branding

name: Add Discord ops skill to HeadyBuddy
desc: Integrate assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/skills/discord-ops-designer.md as a HeadyBuddy skill for Discord community management tasks

name: Add MCP service inventor skill to orchestration
desc: Integrate assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/skills/mcp-service-inventor.md as auto-success task to auto-generate new MCP services from descriptions

name: Create first-lane GitHub project from project-notes
desc: Use assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/github/project-notes/first-lane.md to create the first GitHub project board for HeadyAI/Heady

name: Wire HuggingFace space to Heady vector memory
desc: Connect HuggingFace Space static frontend to Heady vector memory API for public-facing semantic search demos

name: Extract all beneficial-bundle tasks into auto-success catalog
desc: Parse all-beneficial-manifest.json from assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/manifests/ and create auto-success tasks for each item

name: Build Discord content scheduler from status-lines
desc: Use assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/discord/content/status-lines.md to build automated Discord status update scheduler

name: Use Discord embed template for system alerts
desc: Wire assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/discord/templates/embed-template.json to auto-success engine — send rich embeds on critical events

name: Build issue #001: Signal-Weave MCP service implementation
desc: Follow assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/github/issues/001-build-signal-weave.md — implement the full signal-weave MCP service spec

name: Build issue #002: Create HuggingFace space
desc: Follow assets/beneficial-bundle/starter/github/issues/002-create-hf-space.md — deploy the HuggingFace space with Dockerfile and static content

name: Create @heady-ai/beneficial-bundle npm package
desc: Package the entire assets/beneficial-bundle as a publishable npm package @heady-ai/beneficial-bundle for easy bootstrapping of new Heady deployments
